name: flexiblas
desc: BLAS and LAPACK wrapper library with runtime exchangable backends
caveats:
FlexiBLAS includes the following backends: APPLE, OpenBLASOpenMP, NETLIB
APPLE has been set as the default in $HOMEBREW_PREFIX/etc/flexiblasrc

ventura.caveats:
FlexiBLAS includes the following backends: OpenBLASOpenMP, NETLIB, APPLE
OpenBLASOpenMP has been set as the default in $HOMEBREW_PREFIX/etc/flexiblasrc

OpenBLASOpenMP has been set as the default in $HOMEBREW_PREFIX/etc/flexiblasrc
